nasb.text: But when Jacob heard that there was grain in Egypt, he sent our fathers there the first time.

esv.text: But when Jacob heard that there was grain in Egypt, he sent out our fathers on their first visit.

cnv.text: 雅各聽見埃及有穀糧，就派我們的祖先去，這是第一次。

ccb.text: 雅各听说埃及有粮，就派先祖们去那里买粮，那是我们的先祖初次去埃及。

csbs.text: 雅各听说埃及有粮食，就派我们的祖先去，这是第一次。
